dict.string: Lokus uses the microphone to record meeting audio for real-time transcription via your Deepgram API key. Audio is streamed directly to Deepgram and is not stored by Lokus.
Lokus needs access to your Desktop folder to open and manage note files you have saved there.
Lokus needs access to your Documents folder to open and manage your note workspaces stored there.
Lokus needs access to your Downloads folder to import files you have downloaded into your notes.
